_meta.purpose: District-level email pattern lookup for cold-outreach pipeline. Used as FALLBACK when a teacher's email is not published on the school's faculty page.
_meta.pattern_syntax: Python str.format with {first} and {last} placeholders. Both are normalized: lowercase, non-alpha chars stripped (so 'Ana Maria' -> 'anamaria', "O'Brien" -> 'obrien', 'Vasquez-Gil' -> 'vasquezgil').

confidence_values.verified: directly observed in extracted faculty data
confidence_values.high: well-documented standard for this district / commonly cited
confidence_values.variable: district uses multiple formats; pattern is best-guess majority case

_meta.matching: Key must match the 'district' column in teacher_dmv.csv exactly (LEA_NAME from NCES). Special key 'independent' matches MD nonpublic rows.
_meta.usage_rule: Real extracted email > pattern prediction. Predicted emails MUST be marked email_verified=N and pass Hunter/NeverBounce check before any mass send.

Montgomery County Public Schools.verified_via: Walt Whitman HS Google Doc staff directory, 2026-05-21
Montgomery County Public Schools.notes: Underscore separator. Validated against 15-teacher sample (Whitman HS World Languages): 40% case-insensitive match. The ~60% miss is mostly middle-initial variants ({first}_{m}_{last}, e.g., kathleen_e_bartels). Pattern prediction is best-guess only — always prefer extracted email.

District of Columbia Public Schools.notes: DCPS standard. Each charter LEA uses its own domain — see charter entries.

Fairfax County Public Schools.notes: FCPS uses multiple formats simultaneously: first.last (~45%), jdoe i.e. {first[0]}{last} (~55%), and {first[0:2]}{last} occasionally. Bot-blocked by Cloudflare — use playwright-cli for actual extraction; this pattern is fallback only.

Baltimore County Public Schools.notes: Not to be confused with Baltimore City Schools.

Baltimore City Public Schools.notes: Baltimore City is an independent jurisdiction, separate domain from Baltimore County.

Howard County Public School System.notes: HCPSS uses underscores like MCPS, not dots.

Frederick County Public Schools.notes: Same district name as Fairfax in VA but completely different domain (fcps.org vs fcps.edu).

independent.notes: MD nonpublic / independent schools each have their own domain — no shared pattern. Skip prediction; rely on extraction or manual lookup.
